tasks.title: Constants and agent paths
tasks.notes: Added AGENTS_DIR constant, getClaudeAgentsDir(), and getClaudeDirForType() to constants.js and paths.js

tasks.title: Init command
tasks.notes: Imported getClaudeAgentsDir, added agentsDir to the directory creation loop

tasks.title: Install command
tasks.notes: Replaced routing ternary with getClaudeDirForType(), ensureDir for agents in auto-init, added agent usage hint. Updated install.test.js mock to include getClaudeDirForType and getClaudeAgentsDir.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 1
tasks.notes: npm test passed: 174/174 tests passing (17 test files). No regressions.

tasks.title: Update command
tasks.notes: Replaced getClaudeSkillsDir/getClaudeCommandsDir import with getClaudeDirForType. Replaced routing ternary with getClaudeDirForType(type, isGlobal). Updated description to mention agents.

tasks.title: List and search commands
tasks.notes: Updated --type option description in list.js and search.js to include agent. Added chalk.yellow('[agent]') label in printSearchResults.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 2
tasks.notes: npm test passed: 174/174 tests passing (17 test files). No regressions. update.test.js mock updated to include getClaudeDirForType and getClaudeAgentsDir.

tasks.title: Unit tests for paths and routing
tasks.notes: Added 5 new tests in paths.test.js: getClaudeAgentsDir local, getClaudeAgentsDir global, getClaudeDirForType skill, getClaudeDirForType agent, getClaudeDirForType command.

tasks.title: Command tests
tasks.notes: Added 7 tests: install.test.js (2 — agent routes to .claude/agents/, agent usage message), init.test.js (1 — agents dir created when skills+commands exist), update.test.js (1 — agent update routes to .claude/agents/), search.test.js (1 — --type agent filter), list.test.js (1 — agent in list and --type agent filter), remove.test.js (1 — removing agent-type package).

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 3
tasks.notes: npm test passed: 186/186 tests passing (17 test files). 12 new tests added (5 paths + 7 command). Zero regressions on 174 existing tests.

tasks.title: Authoring guide and plug README
tasks.notes: authoring-guide.md: added agent row to type table, agent template section, updated meta.json type field and verify step. plug/README.md: added agents to intro, updated init description, added --type agent to list and search examples, updated 'How it works' directory tree.

tasks.title: Root README
tasks.notes: Root README.md: added agents bullet to 'What is this?' section, updated init description, added --type agent to list/search examples, updated 'How it works' directory tree.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 4
tasks.notes: npm test passed: 186/186 tests (17 files). Docs reviewed: agent type consistently described in authoring-guide.md, plug/README.md, and root README.md. No broken links, no stale references.

tasks.title: GitHub Actions CI workflow
tasks.notes: Created .github/workflows/ci.yml with name CI, push/PR triggers on main, ubuntu-latest job, node-version matrix [18, 20, 22], npm ci and npm test steps in plug/ working-directory.

tasks.title: README badges
tasks.notes: Added 4 shields.io badges at top of root README.md: CI, License: MIT, Node.js 18+, npm (plugvault).

tasks.title: LICENSE file
tasks.notes: Created MIT LICENSE at repo root. Copyright 2026 Siddharth Deshpande.

tasks.title: VERIFY Phase 5
tasks.notes: npm test passed: 186/186 tests (17 files). ci.yml is valid YAML. Badges use correct dsiddharth2/plug URLs. LICENSE file present with MIT license, 2026 copyright.
